title: Task 1: Go module + project scaffold
description: Initialize go.mod, add all dependencies (chi, pgx, migrate, gofeed, uuid, cors), create project directory structure (cmd/server, internal/api, internal/ingester, internal/store, internal/poller, migrations, testdata), write minimal main.go that reads DATABASE_URL. See docs/plans/2026-03-17-podcatcher-impl.md Task 1.
close_reason: Go module, deps, and project structure scaffolded. Commit 26e2222.

title: Task 9: HTTP server + feeds handlers
description: Write internal/api/server.go (chi router, all routes), internal/api/feeds.go (listFeeds, createFeed, deleteFeed, refreshFeed), internal/api/stubs.go (placeholder handlers for remaining routes). See docs/plans/2026-03-17-podcatcher-impl.md Task 9.
close_reason: HTTP server scaffold + feeds endpoints. Compile clean.

title: Task 10: Remaining API handlers
description: Replace stubs.go with full implementations of: listSeries, createSeries, listRules, createRule, updateRule, deleteRule, listEpisodes, getEpisode, getPlayback, upsertPlayback, addEpisodeSeries, removeEpisodeSeries, renameSeries, opmlImport, opmlExport. See docs/plans/2026-03-17-podcatcher-impl.md Task 10.
close_reason: All remaining API handlers (episodes, series, rules, playback, OPML). Compile clean.

title: Task 2: Database migrations
description: Write migrations/001_initial.up.sql (feeds, feed_rules, episodes, series, series_episodes, playback_state tables), migrations/001_initial.down.sql, and internal/store/migrate.go RunMigrations helper. See docs/plans/2026-03-17-podcatcher-impl.md Task 2.

title: Task 15: Views — feeds, episodes, series nav
description: Write React views: FeedList, EpisodeList with filters/sort (date range, played, series), SeriesNav. See docs/plans/2026-03-17-podcatcher-impl.md Task 15.
close_reason: React views: FeedList, EpisodeList, EpisodeFilters, EpisodeItem, SeriesNav, App.tsx. Commit 7c0ed6d.

title: Task 12: HTTP acceptance tests
description: Write internal/api/acceptance_test.go with TestFeedsEndpoints, TestPlaybackPersistence, and other end-to-end tests using httptest.Server. See docs/plans/2026-03-17-podcatcher-impl.md Task 12.

title: Task 5: Store — series, rules, playback
description: Write internal/store/series.go (additive AssignEpisodeToSeries, RemoveEpisodeFromSeries with seriesID), internal/store/rules.go, internal/store/playback.go. See docs/plans/2026-03-17-podcatcher-impl.md Task 5.

title: Task 17: Embed frontend into Go binary
description: Use go:embed to bundle the web/dist/ build output into the Go binary and serve it from main.go. See docs/plans/2026-03-17-podcatcher-impl.md Task 17.

title: Task 4: Store — episodes
description: Write internal/store/episodes.go with Episode struct, EpisodeFilter, UpsertEpisode, GetEpisode, ListEpisodes (with sort/filter/date-range support). See docs/plans/2026-03-17-podcatcher-impl.md Task 4.
close_reason: Episodes store with sort/filter. Commit ca40f39.

title: Task 8: Episode ingester
description: Write internal/ingester/ingester.go (Ingester struct with FetchAndIngest method that fetches RSS, upserts episodes, runs series detection with additive assignment). See docs/plans/2026-03-17-podcatcher-impl.md Task 8.
close_reason: Ingester with additive series assignment. Compile clean. Commit 9ba57f2.

title: Task 3: Store — feeds CRUD
description: Write internal/store/store.go (Store struct, New, Close), internal/store/feeds.go (Feed struct, CreateFeed, GetFeed, ListFeeds, UpdateFeedMeta, DeleteFeed), internal/store/feeds_test.go (TestFeedCRUD). See docs/plans/2026-03-17-podcatcher-impl.md Task 3.
close_reason: Store, feeds CRUD. Compile clean. Commit 0205be3.

title: Task 13: Vite + React scaffold
description: Create web/ directory, scaffold with npm create vite@latest using react-ts template, install @tanstack/react-query react-router-dom axios howler @types/howler. Verify npm run build succeeds. See docs/plans/2026-03-17-podcatcher-impl.md Task 13.
close_reason: Vite+React+TS scaffold created in web/. Commit 036d6e2.

title: Task 14: API client + types
description: Write web/src/types.ts (Feed, Episode, Series, PlaybackState, FeedRule, EpisodeListParams interfaces), web/src/api.ts (axios client wrapping all endpoints), update web/src/main.tsx with QueryClientProvider + BrowserRouter. See docs/plans/2026-03-17-podcatcher-impl.md Task 14.
close_reason: API client, types, React Query + Router setup. Commit 79bd79f.

title: Task 16: Audio player
description: Write React audio player component using Howler.js with playback state sync (save position every 10s, mark complete). See docs/plans/2026-03-17-podcatcher-impl.md Task 16.
close_reason: Audio player (Player.tsx + usePlayer.ts) with Howler.js heartbeat, seek, speed. Commit 7c0ed6d.

title: Task 11: Background poller + main.go
description: Write internal/poller/poller.go (background RSS polling loop), update cmd/server/main.go to wire up store, ingester, API server, run migrations, serve static files. See docs/plans/2026-03-17-podcatcher-impl.md Task 11.
close_reason: Background poller + full main.go wired up. Compile clean.

title: Task 6: RSS parser
description: Write internal/ingester/rss.go (ParseRSS function using gofeed), create testdata XML fixtures (feed_murder_shack.xml, feed_miami_mince.xml, feed_prefixnum.xml), write internal/ingester/rss_test.go. See docs/plans/2026-03-17-podcatcher-impl.md Task 6.
close_reason: RSS parser with tests passing. Commit f0feaa5.

title: Task 7: Series detector
description: Write internal/ingester/detector.go with regex-based series detection logic. See docs/plans/2026-03-17-podcatcher-impl.md Task 7.
close_reason: Series detector, all 7 tests pass. Commit 5df4998.
